flashcards.definition: Actin (thin) filaments slide past myosin (thick) filaments, shortening the sarcomere.
Myosin heads attach to actin, pivot (power stroke), detach, re-cock — repeating cycle.
Regulatory protein on actin that binds Ca²⁺ and moves tropomyosin off the binding sites.
Protein covering actin binding sites at rest; moves when Ca²⁺ binds troponin.
The pivoting of the myosin head that pulls actin, generating force.
